tamis-tri-color-caprese-salad.name: Tami's Tri Color Caprese Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Arrange alternate slices of yellow tomato, whole basil leaves, slices of red tomato, and mozzarella cheese slices on a serving platter in rows; sprinkle with shaved shallot. Drizzle olive oil and balsamic vinegar over the salad; season with salt and black pepper.

tangy-tamari-dressing.name: Tangy Tamari Dressing
instructions: Blend olive oil, nutritional yeast, tamari, cider vinegar, lemon juice, garlic powder, basil, oregano, and thyme together in a food processor or blender until dressing is smooth.

taramokeftedes-argiro.name: Taramokeftedes

ingredients.item: 4-5 fresh onions small and finely chopped
4-5 fresh onions small and finely chopped

instructions: Heat some oil in a pan and sauté theions for 2–3 minutes, until they Wilt and Sweeten. Leave them on the side to cool.
In a bowl, add the bread and soak with some water.
In another bowl, add the tarmac, dill, mint, onions and some pepper. Strain a lemon and mix the mixture to dilute the taramas.
Drain and dry the soaked bread well, drizzle it in the mixture of the tarmac. Mix very well to homogenize.
If the mixture is fine and not molded, add 1–2 tabletspoons of flower for example so that it can be easily made.
With wet hands, we make the taramo meatballs and press them lightly so that they have a plate shape.
After we make them all, we bake them lightly in a little flour, blowing the unnecessary.
Heat the olive oil in moderate intensity. Fry for about 2 minutes on each side until slightly golden.
Place the taramoballs on a kitchen paper to absorb the excess oil.

tasty-blue-cheese-salad-dressing.name: Tasty Blue Cheese Salad Dressing
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Stir mayonnaise, sour cream, buttermilk, lemon juice, sherry, and garlic salt together in a bowl.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Fold blue cheese through the mixture.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate 2 hours.'}

teddy-bear-juice.name: Teddy Bear Juice
instructions: Mix apple juice, hot water, lemon juice, and honey in a mug; stir. Serve warm.

tempeh-gyros.name: Tempeh Gyros

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine vegetable broth, soy sauce, lemon juice, oregano, thyme, 1 1/2 teaspoons garlic, Himalayan salt, and pinch black pepper in a large bowl.
Fill a saucepan with water; bring to a boil. Cut tempeh in half; add to the boiling water. Boil tempeh to remove any bitter taste, about 10 minutes, then transfer to a cutting board; cool slightly.

Cut tempeh into 1/4-inch slices; add to vegetable broth marinade and toss to coat. Cover bowl with plastic wrap; marinate in the refrigerator 8 hours to overnight, stirring occasionally, making sure tempeh is covered with marinade.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Remove tempeh from marinade, letting excess drip off; place on the prepared baking sheet. Discard remaining marinade.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and beginning to crisp at the edges, 30 to 35 minutes, flipping halfway.
Place pitas in the hot oven until warmed through, 3 to 5 minutes.

Squeeze excess water from cucumbers using paper towels. Combine cucumbers, tofu, dill, 1 teaspoon garlic, salt, and black pepper in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until blended. Taste tzatziki; adjust seasonings if desired.
Place 1/4 tempeh slices, tomatoes, and red onions on top of 1 pita; drizzle with tzatziki. Repeat with remaining tempeh, tomatoes, onion, pitas, and tzatziki.

thanksgiving-noodles.name: Thanksgiving Noodles
instructions: Combine eggs, egg yolks, water, and salt in a bowl; beat with an electric mixer until combined. Beat in 2 cups flour. Mix in 1 cup flour with a wooden spoon. Add more flour to make it as thick as you can stir. Divide dough into 4 equal balls.

Generously dust a pastry cloth, a rolling pin, and 4 sheets of waxed paper with flour. Roll each ball of dough on the pastry cloth until 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick. Let dough sit for 45 minutes. Flip each piece of dough (it will be hard to flip) and let sit for another 45 minutes.
Stack pieces of dough together and cut into noodles. Let noodles dry for about 3 hours.
Bring chicken broth to a boil in a large pot. Add noodles and cook, uncovered, until soft with no bite and the broth has thickened, 15 to 20 minutes.

the-easiest-salad-dressing.name: The Easiest Salad Dressing

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine canola oil, red wine vinegar, salt, sugar, and pepper in a lidded jar. Close and shake to combine.

the-modern-martini.name: The Modern Martini

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Combine sugar and 2 tablespoons hot water in a large jar, cover, and shake until sugar is dissolved. Add gin, cilantro, and lime juice (save gin bottle for finished product). Cover and chill 2 days. Strain into a medium bowl; discard cilantro. Pour cilantro-lime gin back into reserved bottle.

For each cocktail, pour 3 ounces cilantro-lime gin into a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Cover; shake until cocktail shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled Martini glass and garnish with lime.
DO AHEAD: Cilantro-Lime Gin can be made 1 month ahead. Keep chilled.

these-lemon-ones-teleculinaria.name: These Lemon Ones
instructions: In a bowl, beat the eggs, yolk and sugar well. Then add the flour and the lemon zest and beat a little more. Put it in a pastry bag with medium smooth round mouthpiece.
Put on an oven tray with butter. Make sure you have portions of mass, well separated from each other and having the effect of "this". Let it rest for about 30 minutes.
Then take it to the preheated oven at 200°C between 10 and 15 minutes or until cooked. Remove from the oven, let it cool and serve.

tieton-apricot-tart-with-basil-custard.name: Tieton Apricot Tart With Basil Custard
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Whisk all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, almond meal, 1 tablespoon sugar, lemon zest, and salt together in a large bowl; cut in butter with a pastry blender until mixture forms pea-sized crumbs. Stir in buttermilk until dough comes together.
Press dough into the bottom and ½ inch up sides of a 16x12-inch baking pan or baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 20 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack, about 1 hour.

Meanwhile, whisk egg yolks, ⅔ cup sugar, and cornstarch together in a heavy-bottomed saucepan; whisk in milk. Add basil; cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until mixture begins to steam, about 8 minutes. Reduce heat to low and discard basil. Whisk vigorously until custard thickens, about 1 minute.

Set a mesh strainer over a large bowl. Pour custard through strainer; press it through using a rubber spatula. Whisk vanilla extract into custard. Press a piece of plastic wrap directly onto custard surface. Refrigerate until cold, about 3 hours.
Pour custard into crust; spread to edges with a rubber spatula. Arrange apricot slices on top.
Place apricot jam in a small microwave-safe bowl; microwave on high until melted, about 1 minute. Brush jam over apricot slices.

tiramisu-with-sponge-cake-argiro.name: Tiramisu With Sponge Cake

ingredients.item: 2vanillas (or 1 tablespoon of liquid vanilla or bitter almonds)
2 tablespoons of coffee (or amaretto or cognac)
250 grating milk beaten in thick form (cold)
2vanillas (or 1 tablespoon of liquid vanilla or bitter almonds)
2 tablespoons of coffee (or amaretto or cognac)
250 grating milk beaten in thick form (cold)

instructions: Place the milk in a bowl, add the lemon, mix and set it aside for 10 minutes.
Dissolve the soda in the milk a few minutes before adding to the mixture.
Shake the flour with the baking powder.
We butter two forms of 22 cm and we make baking paper.
Preheat the evening to 160°C in the air.
In a bowl, with a hand mixer at medium speed, beat the soft butter to fluffy for 1 minute.
Add the sugar and continue beating with the mixer for 2 to 3 minutes to melt the sugar and hang the mixture.
One at a time add the eggs, each time the mixture drinks them before adding the next egg.
We add the vanillas.
Dissolve the instant coffee into the cognac and add them to the mixture.
Lower the mixer speed and alternately add the flour and milk.
We always start with flour and finish with flour in 3 consecutive doses with flour-milk.

tomato-cod-teleculinaria.name: Tomato Cod
instructions: Corte as cebolas em tiras finas e lamine os alhos.
In a frying pan, add 1/5 dl of olive oil, the onions, garlic, the colorau and the laurel leaf. Cook for 2 minutes. Add tomatoes cut into pieces, skinless and seedless, wine and tomato pulp.
In a separate pot, cook the potatoes in water and salt for 8 minutes. Drain and reserve.
Place the cod wet on a plate of dishes, water it with olive oil and bring it to the oven preheated at 200°C about 10 minutes.
Retire o bacalhau do forno e sirva-o i com a batata cozida. Regue tudo com a cebolada de tomate que preparou.

tomato-feta-open-face-sandwich.name: Tomato-feta Open-face Sandwich

ingredients.item: Thick slice white bread (pullman is ideal)

instructions: Place the lightly toasted white bread on a plate.
Drizzle the bread generously with olive oil.
Arrange the thinly sliced tomatoes, thick feta slices, and oregano leaves on top of the bread.
Season with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Finish with an additional drizzle of olive oil before serving.

tortellini-with-garlicky-brown-butter-an.name: Tortellini With Garlicky Brown Butter And Dill
instructions: Cook 4 oz. fresh cheese tortellini (about 1 heaping cup) in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 2 minutes less than package directions.

Meanwhile, cook 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, in a medium skillet over medium heat until golden brown and nutty smelling, 2–3 minutes (watch carefully). Remove from heat and stir in 2 garlic cloves, finely chopped, a pinch of salt, and several grinds of freshly ground pepper.

Using a mesh sieve, scoop tortellini out of cooking liquid and transfer to skillet with brown butter sauce. Set over low heat and toss to coat, adding a splash or two of pasta cooking liquid if you’d like a looser sauce. Stir in ¼ cup chopped dill and juice of ½ lemon.
Transfer pasta to a shallow bowl and top with zest of ½ lemon; season with flaky sea salt and more pepper.

tropical-cake-teleculinaria.name: Tropical Cake
instructions: Unte uma forma redonda sem buraco (22cm), com manteiga e polvilhe com farinha.

In a bowl, add the eggs with the sugar and beat well until the cream is whitish. Add the flour and cocoa and wrap well. It pours into the form and ovens, preheated at 180oC, for 25 to 30 minutes. Remove from the oven, let cool and cut into 3 slices.
In a bowl, whip the cream into whipped cream, add the cheese and sugar and beat a little more. Peel the sleeve, remove the pit and cut into small cubes. Also cut the strawberries and pineapple.
Fill the layers of cake with the whipped cream and some cut fruit. Decorate with the remaining fruit and mint leaves.
Unte uma forma redonda sem buraco (22cm), com manteiga e polvilhe com farinha.

In a bowl, add the eggs with the sugar and beat well until the cream is whitish. Add the flour and cocoa and wrap well. It pours into the form and ovens, preheated at 180oC, for 25 to 30 minutes. Remove from the oven, let cool and cut into 3 slices.
In a bowl, whip the cream into whipped cream, add the cheese and sugar and beat a little more. Peel the sleeve, remove the pit and cut into small cubes. Also cut the strawberries and pineapple.
Fill the layers of cake with the whipped cream and some cut fruit. Decorate with the remaining fruit and mint leaves.

truffle-risotto-recipe-in-a-few-minutes-.name: Truffle Risotto Recipe In A Few Minutes
truffle-risotto-recipe-in-a-few-minutes-.original_name: Receta de risotto de trufa en pocos minutos
instructions: Limpia y pica finamente la cebolla y el ajo. Ralla el queso Parmesano.
In a large and profound frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add onion and garlic, and spray until clear about 5 minutes.
Add Arborio rice to frying pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly to slightly toast the grains.
Vierte el vino blanco y cocina hasta que se evapore casi por completo, removiendo continuamente.

Add a cup of hot stock and cook, stirring often, till the rice absorbs the liquid. Repeat this process and add a cup of stock at a time, until the rice is creamy and cooked at dente, about 18-20 minutes.
Ralla la trufa fresca sobre el risotto. Incorpora el queso Parmesano y la mantequilla, y mezcla bien hasta que se derritan y se integren completamente. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Sirve el risotto de trufa caliente, decorado con perejil fresco picado si lo deseas.

tuna-pasta-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Tuna Pasta Salad Recipe
tuna-pasta-salad-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de ensalada de pasta con atún

turkey-in-a-smoker.name: Turkey In A Smoker
instructions: Preheat a smoker to 225 to 121°C (110 to 120 degrees C).
Pat turkey dry thoroughly with paper towels—inside and out. This removes excess moisture and also helps skin crisp during roasting.
Rub crushed garlic over the outside of the turkey, and sprinkle with seasoned salt. Transfer to a disposable roasting pan.
Fill the turkey cavity with butter, cola, apple, onion, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Cover turkey loosely with foil.

Add wood chips to the smoker according to the manufacturer's directions. Place the roasting pan in the preheated smoker. Smoke the turkey, basting every 1 to 2 hours with juices from the bottom of the roasting pan, for 5 hours.

Add more wood chips if desired. Continue smoking and basting, until turkey is no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 4 to 5 more hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 82°C (80 degrees C). Remove from the smoker, tent loosely with foil, and let rest for 20 minutes before carving.

turkey-skillet-pot-pie-with-buttermilk-b.name: Turkey Skillet Pot Pie With Buttermilk Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 375˚F (190˚C).
In a 10-inch (25 cm) cast iron skillet, melt 4 tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add the ¼ cup (30 g) of flour, and cook, stirring constantly, until smooth.
Add the chicken stock and salt to taste. Cook until the stock has reduced and thickened.
Add in the rosemary, frozen vegetables, turkey, and additional salt, and stir until fully mixed. Remove from the heat.
Add remaining flour, baking soda, 8 tablespoons of butter, and pinch of salt to a bowl. Using a wooden spoon or your hands, mix together until the butter is the size of peas.
Add the buttermilk and mix until the dough barely comes together, about 1 minute.
Place the dough on a floured countertop and gently form into a 1½-inch (4 cm) thick layer.
Use a 3-inch (6 cm) round cutter to cut 10-12 biscuits, rerolling the dough as needed.
Place the biscuits on the turkey in the cast iron skillet. Brush the top of the biscuits with heavy cream (optional).  Bake for 20-25 minutes, until biscuits are golden brown.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy!
